summary: Iteration 75 - Comprehensive testing of 5 bug fixes. All tests passed: (1) Natural sort on AUX column working correctly with localeCompare numeric option - ADMIN, AUX-1, AUX-2, AUX-3, AUX-101...AUX-111 in ascending order. (2) Sponsor column now sortable with data-testid='th-sponsor_membership_number' and natural numeric ordering. (3) /api/docs/testing-manual returns 200 (was 500) - defensive regex-based sort key handles email-style usernames like samplemember11@gmail.com. (4) Community modal shows all 7 new fields: phone, gender, date_of_birth, country, state, city, zip_code with data-testids. (5) Bell icon color is gold rgb(201,168,76) from --ma-bell-icon CSS variable, not grey. (6) Regression tests from iterations 70-74 passed - mentor column derivation correct (carlos NOT mentor, anthonytest IS mentor).
critical_code_review_comments: useDataTable.js compareValues() correctly uses localeCompare with {numeric: true} for natural AUX-1 < AUX-2 < AUX-10 ordering
MembersManager.js Sponsor column changed from <th> to <SortableTh field='sponsor_membership_number'> with correct data-testid
docs.py _sample_sort_key uses regex to extract trailing integer; non-numeric usernames sort to end without crashing
membership.py /member/my-community endpoint returns all 7 new fields: phone, gender, date_of_birth, country, state, city, zip_code
MyCommunity.js modal has grid with 7 fields using data-testids: community-modal-phone, community-modal-gender, etc.
themeColors.js MYACCOUNT_COLORS includes bell_icon, bell_hover_bg, bell_badge_bg, bell_badge_text
MyAccountLayout.js Bell uses var(--ma-bell-icon) for color and var(--ma-bell-badge-bg) for badge background

test_credentials.samplemember1: samplemember1@gmail.com / 123456789 (has 7 community children AUX-104 to AUX-110)

seed_data_creation: 15 members total (admin + AUX-1/2/3 + 11 sample members AUX-101 to AUX-111)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 verified all 5 bug fixes: (1) Natural sort on AUX column uses localeCompare with numeric:true, (2) Sponsor column is now sortable with SortableTh component, (3) Testing manual endpoint handles email-style usernames with defensive regex sort, (4) Community modal has 7 new fields with proper data-testids, (5) Bell icon uses gold color from CSS variable. AUX-111 (Sample Member 11) was created via UI with email samplemember11@gmail.com - this is the member that was causing the testing-manual 500 error before the fix.

details.ascending_order: ADMIN, AUX-1, AUX-2, AUX-3, AUX-101, AUX-102, AUX-103, AUX-104, AUX-105, AUX-106, AUX-107, AUX-108, AUX-109, AUX-110, AUX-111
details.descending_order: AUX-111, AUX-110, AUX-109, AUX-108, AUX-107, AUX-106, AUX-105, AUX-104, AUX-103, AUX-102, AUX-101, AUX-3, AUX-2, AUX-1, ADMIN

details.ascending_order: - (no sponsor), AUX-1, AUX-1, AUX-1, AUX-2, AUX-3, AUX-3, AUX-101, AUX-101, AUX-101...
details.natural_sort: Members with no sponsor sort to end, then AUX-1 sponsors before AUX-2 before AUX-101

details.fix: Defensive _sample_sort_key uses regex to extract trailing integer from username
details.handles_email_usernames: samplemember11@gmail.com sorts to end without crashing
